title: BEM-867 validate queue json
objective:
Run script:
"""
qdir = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_queue_json_validation')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
bad = []
good = []
for f in sorted(qdir.glob('*.json')) if qdir.exists() else []:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    try:
        data = json.loads(text)
        wf = str(data.get('workflow') or '') if isinstance(data, dict) else ''
        good.append(f.name + ' -> ' + wf)
        code = 'GOOD'
    except:
        bad.append(f.name)
        code = 'BAD'
    marker = outdir / (code + '_' + ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in f.name) + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue JSON validation\nFile: ' + str(f) + '\nStatus: ' + code + '\n\nText prefix:\n' + text[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(marker))
status = 'ALL_VALID' if not bad else 'BAD_JSON_FOUND'
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_JSON_VALIDATION_' + status + '.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-867 queue JSON validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\nGood:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in good) + '\nBad:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in bad) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 queue JSON validation: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
